title: W-tap_Mod
description: The W-tap_Mod allows you to w-tap extremely well with precision. Can be toggled with keybind 'R'. For fabric 1.21.9
body:
**AutoSprint Mod — Effortless Sprinting & Smarter W-Tapping**

Take control of your movement with AutoSprint, a lightweight Fabric mod that automates sprinting and introduces an intelligent W-tapping system — perfect for PvP players, speedrunners, and anyone who just wants smoother movement. 

⚙️ Features
🔁 Smart W-Tapping: Releases and re-presses 'W' to reset sprint hits every time player hits an entity for better PvP and combo locks!

Has no effect on preformance!

🎮 Toggle Key (R): Instantly enable or disable W-Tap mode. You can change this in your keybinds settings.

💬 Status Feedback: Displays in-game messages so you always know when AutoSprint is on or off.

⚡ Lightweight & Compatible: Works seamlessly with other Fabric mods and has zero impact on performance.

🎮 Keybinds
Action	Default Key
Toggle AutoSprint / W-Tap	R

🧩 Compatibility
✅ Minecraft: 1.21.9
✅ Fabric Loader: 0.17.3+
✅ Fabric API: Required
✅ Java: 21+

**Important Notes**

For singleplayer or servers where this mod is approved only. Use on public servers at your own risk.

**Updates**
Should I make a 1.21.10 version? Let me know in github!
